The UAE says it intercepted 23 ballistic missiles and 56 drones from Iran today (April 4). Since this round of attacks began in late February, the UAE says it has intercepted 498 ballistic missiles, 23 cruise missiles, and 2,141 drones.

🇮🇹 🇶🇦 Qatar and Italy Push for Regional Stability and Energy Cooperation. During a high-level summit in Doha today, Emir Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani and Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni held talks centered on easing global tensions and safeguarding energy supplies. The two leaders engaged in a comprehensive review of the current international landscape, emphasizing a shared commitment to de-escalation and the reinforcement of energy security frameworks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Two U.S. HC-130J Combat King II rescue tankers departed Stuttgart Army Airfield and are heading toward the Middle East, strongly indicating the search for the missing F-15E crew member is still active and likely expanding. The HC-130J is specifically used to support combat search-and-rescue, especially by refueling HH-60/Pave Hawk rescue helicopters in flight.

Iran’s state media says fishermen found wreckage of a downed U.S. MQ-9 Reaper near Bushehr, but OSINT analysts say it’s almost certainly not an MQ-9. The debris appears to match a Chinese-made Wing Loong II, likely operated by a regional state such as Saudi Arabia or the UAE. This is at least the second Wing Loong II wreckage found by Iranian forces. Either Saudi Arabia or UAE is actively involved in operations against Iran along with U.S. and Israel. Source: fab_hinz

Visioner 👀 🇺🇦 Ukrainian Foreign Intelligence Service: ❗️ A large-scale collapse has begun in the infrastructure of data centers in Russia: outdated equipment is massively failing, and due to sanctions and the costs of the war with Ukraine, the Russian Federation is practically unable to replace it in a timely and complete manner. 👉 Over the past 6 months, the number of failures has significantly increased in small commercial data centers (processing data centers) and local IT sites of companies. 🔸 According to market participants, the problem has already affected about 20% of commercial data centers. 📌 The same situation applies to fiber-optic networks laid in the early 2000s. The warranty period for the main cables in the "West-East" direction expired in 2025. tweet

Critics say the shift is a blow to Ethiopia's historic resistance against colonialism & Apartheid. READ MORE

Nuno Felix RT @Mpolymer : On bashing the French and the British…a kind “Go pound sand” to the Fox News crowd who seems to have found their new talking point…so a quick note right here… that in my old world, both countries have been with us time and again. Actual professionals who have been in conflict-not DC creatures who were press secretaries like Ari-know the real deal. For example -the French military provided critical assistance to US SOF during a deadly ambush in Niger in 2017. Saved lives. In extremis. Huge appreciation from the US IC and SOF world. We know when friends come thru. Overall French CT efforts in Africa-who had the lead over us for many years- also helped save US lives. And don’t forget 90 French military were KIA in Afghanistan. That’s a pretty solid ally, when we were in a pinch. Next-US and British forces and intel r tied at the hip, but let’s focus in Afghanistan and Iraq. With 600 plus British KIA in both conflicts. 600 plus. This is all real sacrifice. British intel also on daily basis helps us wrap up terrorist networks, stop proliferation of WMD, better u detest and Russia, Iran, N Korea, and China, so many other massive value added they provide. A superb ally. Essential even. Finally, as Jonah notes, Trump is totally responsible for poisoning the alliance. European reluctance to assist is largely because Trump is so toxic it is politically impossible for other democracies-whose citizens loathe Trump to the core-to do anything other than give us the finger. So all said, as a former ntl security professional who got my hands dirty in our global escapades alongside these allies, I say thank u to them. Particularly!! the British and the French. Have a lovely day. I agree with some of this directionally, but my God the refusal to acknowledge that Trump has worked assiduously to poison the alliance and heap all the blame on Europe is just water-carrying hackery. Saying "NATO will never be the same, and Western European weakness and acquiescence is the cause" is like writing a movie review when you missed the first half of the movie. - Jonah Goldberg tweet

WarTranslated Ukraine’s intelligence says Russia’s data centers are starting to fall apart as aging gear fails and replacements are hard to get. The problem is hitting smaller commercial sites first, with about 20% of data centers affected. Fiber networks from the early 2000s are also wearing out. tweet

He also claims that search-and-rescue operations have ended. This is unverified. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
